metadata.task: Task 3: BOM Rate Validation Against Operational Context
validation_approach: Cross-referenced extracted BOM costs against project memory (BOM migration records)
Verified component item codes match Krisp-derived BK/BL/BKH/BKI/BKJ prefixes
Analyzed Krisp data architecture findings from MEMORY.md
Examined component cost reasonableness (materials, electrical components, cables, enclosures)
Noted absence of supplier invoice baseline data

krisp_data_quality.finding: 98.8% of Krisp rates are ZERO (769/778 in settsalerates.bson)
krisp_data_quality.non_zero_rates: Only 9 documents with actual rates (₹830K-₹1.9M) = customer/special pricing
krisp_data_quality.implication: Cannot validate extracted ERPNext costs against Krisp source data
krisp_data_quality.root_cause: Krisp rates managed separately in accounting, not in product module during operations

erp_next_baseline.source: BOM rate field from ERPNext v15 (dgoc.logstop.com)
erp_next_baseline.all_items_are_eka_prefixed: EAD*, EAB*, EAT*, EEB*, EEC*, EEH*, etc. = DSPL electrical component codes
erp_next_baseline.item_count_in_erp: 6,456 items (454 EPS products with BK/BL prefixes, rest ESS-BOSCH)

bom_migration_status.validation_note: 12 recipes in extracted_boms.json are subset of 244 total migrated BOMs
